![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4904157/196225002-83a52973-0588-4c65-8019-581bffc7c1b8.gif)

$${\color{green}✔}$$  Fixed Mouse Look

$${\color{green}✔}$$  Fixed gamepad support (via [Xidi](https://github.com/samuelgr/Xidi))

$${\color{green}✔}$$  Modern gamepad controls (Brake/Accelerate and Aim/Shoot with Triggers)

$${\color{green}✔}$$  An ability to scroll between weapons with mouse wheel

$${\color{green}✔}$$  Includes d3d9 wrapper with an ability to activate windowed mode and set fps limit

$${\color{green}✔}$$  Automatically skips intro

Installation:

1. Download and install [SilentPatch](https://github.com/CookiePLMonster/SilentPatchScarface/releases/latest). It includes required [ASI Loader](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/Ultimate-ASI-Loader).
2. Download and unpack [Scarface.FusionFix.zip](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/releases/download/scarface/Scarface.FusionFix.zip) to game's root folder.

[Website](https://thirteenag.github.io/wfp#scarface) | [Source](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/source/Scarface.FusionFix/dllmain.cpp) | [Default INI File](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/data/Scarface.FusionFix/scripts/Scarface.FusionFix.ini)
